mapper.sql: id, theme, gender, genre, plot, character_type, style, additional_characteristics, pending_count, res_state, create_time, update_time
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM article_generation_config WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND res_state = 1

SELECT
FROM article_generation_config WHERE theme = #{theme,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND res_state = 1

SELECT
FROM article_generation_config WHERE res_state = 1
AND theme LIKE CONCAT('%', #{theme,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%')
ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT
FROM article_generation_config WHERE res_state = 1 AND pending_count > 0 ORDER BY create_time ASC
